titleStmt.title: SII 9.317: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 317. (A.R. No. 38 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT KOGALI, HADAGALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is damaged and dated the 4th year of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Narasiṁhadēva, Svabhānu, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 1, Sūrya-grahaṇa. There seems to be some mistake about the date. The details cited work out correctly for A.D. 1163 July 4, there having been a solar eclipse on the previous day, viz., July 3 Wednesday. This date fell in the reign of Narasiṁha I but it was not his fourth year. The next Subhānu i.e., A.D. 1223 was the 4th year of Narasiṁha II but the details given are not correct for that year. Some land together with some taxes are stated to have been granted for the service of the god Sōmanāthadēva while Sōmaṇa-Daṇḍanāyaka was the Mahāpradhāna. Some land was given also to Sōmajīyāchārya, the head of the temple. Mention is made of the Brāhman generals Hariharadēva and Śivakīrtidēva and their genealogy is given. Like the Mummuridaṇḍas, the 96,000 and the Seṭṭi-Guttas are described here as Udagra[vīra]-vibhavōdbhāsigaḷ, i.e., shining with immense warlike spirit. The charity was placed in the charge of the Seṭṭi-Guttas, the 96,000, the Mummuridaṇḍas and all the inhabitants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śambhavē . śrīsōmanāthāyanamaḥ śivāya śāntayē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yādavakuḷāṁbaradvima
ṇi samyaktacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja maleparoḷgaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa śani
vārasiddhi giridurggamalla nissaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa vīranārasiṁhadēvarasaru
dōrasamudrada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttumire . tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi . svasti samastapraśasti mahāpradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri
sēnādhipati bāhattaraniyōgādhipati sakaḷalakṣmīpatiyanēkadēśādhipati
yaṁgari lāḷakhaṁḍe ṟaradhiṣṭāyakaṁ mahāpasāytaṁ para
maviśvāsi bāṇasirājakuṁjararuṁ bhāradvājagōtrapavitranuṁ śrīha
riharadēvaradibyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka parabaḷasādhakaṁ nereyoḍegaṁ
ḍa Imma kaṭakada sōvaṇadaṇḍanāyakara mahimeye
nteṁdaḍe . śrī vara rājyade caṁdrārkkaruḷḷaṁnegaṁ vi
nayōdāryya niṣṭaśiṣṭajanakke rāmanaṁ sauryyabhīmananurbbina
yanā sutrāmanaṁ kāminījanasaṁmōha
na kāma kaḷāsupūrṇnanaṁ sōmanaṁ Antanēkapogaḷteve
tta satiyarggaṁ daśaratha
cakravartti gedar meccidanteyuṁ
śrīkāryya daṁteyuṁ śrīhariha
ra geṁbudaṁ tōṟi śrīhariharanāthanantagaṇya
puṇyōdayarumenisi dharmmapratipālanārtthavāgi yesedarmmūvaru .
ka . śrī guṇa vaguṇa mukhadoḷukīrtti
śrī hariharadēvana bhujadoḷu baṁdaru mudadiṁ
Antu catussamudramudritamāda jambūdvīpakkaṁ mukhatiḷakamensiyuṁ noṇambavā
ḍi mūvattircchāsirakkaṁ sikhāmaṇiyensiyuṁ kōgaḷiyaynūṟakaṁ modalensi ne
gaḷda rājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁgaḷa cakravartti kōgaḷiya permmeyeṁtendaḍe . ka . beḷadeṟagida bahu
dhānyada maḷayajamākaṁda yene voppuvanada baḷasiniṁ bagegoḷvudu kōgaḷiye ja
gadoḷatiramaṇīyaṁ . va . Antu seṭṭigutta toṁbhattaṟusāsirbba
ra pe(ṁ)rmmeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . ka . śivakīrttidēvaṁ buddhiyenipa dēviseṭṭiye tātaṁ
jananute dēcavve tāyi vinītaguṇaniḷayanenisida seṭṭigutta sōmanabhinavakāmaṁ . vāsava
nibhavibhavarssivaśāsanadīpakarudagravī vibhavōdbhāsigaḷene toṁbhattaṟusāsirvvara mahi
me pogaḷalārggamaḷuṁbaṁ . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti
hoysaṇavīranārasiṁhadēvavaruṣada nālkaneya svabhānusaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha 1 sō
sūryyagrahaṇa vyatiyapāta saṁkrāntikūḍida puṇyatithiyaṁdu śrīsvayaṁ
bhusōmanāthadēvara Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōganaṁdādīvigenaivēdyajīrnnōddhārakke
sarvvābādhāparihāraṁ māḍi śrīmānyavāgi biṭṭa keyi hagareyiṁ paḍuvalu mo
ge mattaru 4 bellavattada teṁkalu Eremattareṁṭu Antu ma 12 gadde
modalēriyalli kaṁba 200 nuguḷudoṟeyiṁ teṁkadaḍadalli tōṭa kaṁba 200
keyi gaddetōṁṭa pura Āyadāyaviṁtinitumaṁ śrīmānyavāgi Arasugaḷuṁ seṭṭigu
ttaruṁ toṁbhattarusāsirvveruṁ nakhara muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷuṁ samastaprajegaḷuṁ prati
pāḷisuvaru yi sthanake pāsvagagurugaḷa putra sōmajīyanācāryyanu . śrīvudbhavaliṁgagaḷige
śrīkāryyavu naḍevaṁtāgi śrīmā(ṁ)nyavāgi biṭṭa keyi Ā dēvariṁ mūḍalu moge
mattareraḍu 2 gadde Ereyabayalali kaṁba 130 tōṭa hagareyiṁ mūḍa kaṁba 200
koḷagavaṁttasēve soṭige hēṟiṁge nūṟele gojjagautaḷigaḷu biṭṭa Āya caitra
kke vīsa pavitrakke vīsa Aṁtu varuśakke vokkaliṁge bēḷe Antu keI gadde tōṭa Āya
dāya yi(ṁ)ntinituṁ Arasugaḷuṁ seṭṭiguttasōmayyanuṁ toṁbhattaṟusāsirbbaruṁ nakhara mu
ṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷuṁ samastaprajegaḷuṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . yintī dharmmaṁ Āvanānorbbaṁ
pratipāḷisidātaṁ śrīgaṁgeya taḍiyalu sāyira kavile sahasra brāhmaṇarige dānaṁ mā
ḍida phala yintī dharmmake Āvanānorbba kēḍa bagedavaṁge Ā gaṁgeya taḍiyalu Ā kavile
yumaṁ Ā brāhmaṇaruma koṁdaṁtaha mahāpātakavakku Ātana yippattoṁdu ta
leya pitaigaḷu tānu nirṇnayavillada vaitaraṇiyeṁba nāyakavenisida nara
kadalirpparu . na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhuḥ dēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putra
pautrikaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śrīmānyavu .
Digital edition of SII 9.317 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
